# CausalVideoGroup website change

## Change type

- [ ] Pre-meeting discussion
- [ ] Post-meeting note
- [ ] Project page
- [ ] Website, template, or tooling
- [ ] Other

## Topic or project

- Date:
- Title:
- Leader:
- Public URL after merge:

## Pre-meeting checklist

- [ ] `metadata.yaml`, `summary.html`, idea map, and `references.md` exist.
- [ ] At least three key references explain importance, role, limitation, and a question.
- [ ] At least five open questions are included.
- [ ] Central claim and hidden assumption are explicit.
- [ ] Failure boundary and group-research connection are explicit.
- [ ] At least one concrete experiment and discussion seed are included.
- [ ] Large videos are externally hosted and previews are below 10 MiB.
- [ ] Claims, citations, links, and public-release status were checked by the author.

## Post-meeting checklist

- [ ] `meeting-note.md` records changed views and key insights.
- [ ] Critiques, failure cases, and research opportunities are included.
- [ ] Concrete next steps and owners are listed in `action-items.md`.
- [ ] Metadata status is updated to `after-meeting` or `archived`.

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 scripts/build_site.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_site.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Changed pages were previewed locally.

## Reviewer notes

Please assess whether the change supports knowledge creation, not only information summarization.
